groups.description: Formal plant-side baseline capabilities that should stay independently verifiable.
Formal zombie-side pressure baseline for runner, walker, tank, air and reactive units.
Formal slot, lane and placement semantics that should not be owned by showcase scenes.
Formal wave pacing and playable level structure for reusable battle content.
Formal Phase 6 interaction structure that ties roster roles to concrete battle responses.
Validation-only and extension-boundary groups that should stay separate from formal roster ownership.
PVZ1 Batch A original plants: Peashooter, Sunflower, Wall-nut, Snow Pea, Repeater, Cabbage-pult, Melon-pult.
PVZ1 Batch B validation: batch representative coverage plus Potato Mine, Squash, and Chomper single-plant validations. Resources/cards and trusted validations exist for 7/7.

PVZ1 Batch C validation: Puff/Fume spawn path, Ice/Doom on-place damage, Coffee Bean targeted wake, Fume-shroom pierce, Hypno team switch, Sun-shroom production, and Scaredy-shroom shooting. Grave Buster tombstone targeting, Sun-shroom growth, and Scaredy-shroom near-enemy stop-fire remain precision gaps.

PVZ1 Batch D validation: Threepeater multi-lane, Spikeweed ground_damage, Torchwood path, Split Pea dual direction, Starfruit multi-angle, Cactus air target, Blover air-only dispel, Magnet metal targeting, Lily Pad/Sea-shroom water placement, and Sea-shroom wake/damage are behavior checks. Tangle Kelp is only covered by water placement plus a proximity-damage proxy, and Plantern is only covered by resource/card placement smoke; Plantern reveal and exact Tangle Kelp consume/drag semantics remain protocol gaps.

PVZ1 Batch E weak coverage: 9/14 resources/cards exist. Flower Pot roof support and available upgrade placement dependencies are validated, but upgrade replacement, multi-slot occupancy, manual/copy behavior and missing Kernel-pult/Marigold/Imitater/Garlic/Umbrella Leaf still prevent batch completion.
Plants waiting on protocol design before they can be completed.
Round 1 protocol extensions: G-20 upgrade placement, G-12 radius_around, G-13 global_track, G-06 enemies_in_lane, G-17 dispel_flying, G-19 metal tags, G-14 height toggle.
